title: Video: "The Museum of Questionable Medical Devices Tour, 1996"
creator: Demolition Kitchen Media
description: The Museum of Questionable Medical Devices was formerly housed in an old shopping mall in Minneapolis. In 1996 a friend of mine took me to the museum and the proprietor, owner, and curator Bob McCoy was on hand to give us a guided tour of his collection. This is the raw footage of a walk-through with Bob, shot before he passed away, and the collection we donated to the Science Museum in St. Paul.
subject: Museum
